## ✅ Checklist

### Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Relevant docs in `docs/` updated
- [ ] Data Dictionary updated (if schema changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Requirement IDs referenced in code comments

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows ServiceNow naming conventions (`x_univ_library_` prefix)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or instance-specific values
- [ ] Error handling implemented
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] No console.log() or gs.print() left in production code

### Testing

- [ ] Test cases added/updated in `docs/TestCases.md`
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases considered

### Security

- [ ] ACL rules specified for any new tables/fields
- [ ] No PII exposed in logs or URLs
- [ ] Input validation implemented
